case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR VS. NADER FARMANDRAD

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT FARMANDRAD, NADER AN INDIVIDUAL DBA THE DETAIL SHOP AKA THE AUTO SPA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
